content.text: How can I create a decorator that transparently adds line and column metadata to AST nodes generated by my custom Python functions?
If the input node's environment (`node.env`) doesn't contain a line and column tuple, what happens inside `_ast_with_loc`?
The function will likely pass None or default values to the location fields of the AST; you must ensure that the calling context provides complete positional data.
Got it. I'll make sure all my input nodes include robust location information.
